remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation in the document, and save the cleaned PDF to a new file.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates iterating over PDF files in a directory, binding each with PdfAnnotationEditor, removing all annotations, and overwriting the original files.

delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove only text (sticky note) annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-link-annotations-from-pdf-pages.title: Remove Link Annotations from Specific PDF Pages
remove-link-annotations-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to delete all link annotations on pages 3 through 7 of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

delete-named-annotation.title: Delete a Named Annotation from PDF
delete-named-annotation.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation identified by its name from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfAnnotationEditor by passing the annotation name stored in a variable.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor and exporting all its annotations to an XFDF file via a file stream.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Memory Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from specific PDF pages to XFDF format using a MemoryStream with Aspose.Pdf.

filter-exported-annotations-by-type-high.title: Filter Exported Annotations By Type Highlight And Write Them To An Xfdf File Using Exportannotations Overload

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated PDF.

import-xfdf-annotations-to-specific-pdf-.title: Import XFDF Annotations to Specific PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-to-specific-pdf-.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF and keep them only on a defined page range by removing annotations outside that range.

preserve-existing-annotations-while-impo.title: Preserve Existing Annotations While Importing New Ones
preserve-existing-annotations-while-impo.description: Demonstrates importing annotations from multiple source PDFs into a target PDF without overwriting the annotations already present, using PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non-Editable Content
flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade and save the resulting document as a non‑editable PDF.

flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations on the first five pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

modify-annotation-author-on-page.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
modify-annotation-author-on-page.description: Shows how to change the author of annotations on a given page of a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

modify-annotation-subject-color.title: Modify Annotation Subject and Color in PDF
modify-annotation-subject-color.description: Demonstrates changing the subject and color of an existing PDF annotation by creating a new TextAnnotation and applying it with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

set-annotation-open-flag.title: Set Annotation Open Flag for All PDF Annotations
set-annotation-open-flag.description: Shows how to iterate through every page and annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facade API, set the Open flag on text and popup annotations to true, and save the updated document.

update-annotation-modified-date.title: Update Annotation Modified Date in PDF
update-annotation-modified-date.description: Shows how to set the Modified property of existing PDF annotations to the current system time using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

apply-read-only-flag-to-pdf-annotations.title: Apply Read‑Only Flag to PDF Annotations
apply-read-only-flag-to-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates setting the ReadOnly flag on a TextAnnotation template and applying it to existing annotations on a page using PdfAnnotationEditor.

batch-update-annotation-author.title: Batch Update Annotation Author Across Multiple PDFs
batch-update-annotation-author.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, use PdfAnnotationEditor to replace the author of every annotation with a new author, and save the modified PDFs to an output folder.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array via MemoryStream, export all annotations to an XFDF stream, and return the XFDF data as a byte array.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF and XFDF data from streams, import the annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the updated PDF without creating temporary files.

delete-flatten-annotations-pdf.title: Delete and Flatten Annotations in a PDF
delete-flatten-annotations-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, removing all annotations, flattening any remaining ones, and saving the processed document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

validate-exported-xfdf-against-schema.title: Validate Exported XFDF Against Schema
validate-exported-xfdf-against-schema.description: Exports PDF annotations to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf and validates the generated XFDF against the XFDF XSD schema, reporting any validation errors.

delete-all-annotations-and-verify-count.title: Delete All Annotations and Verify Count
delete-all-annotations-and-verify-count.description: The example binds a PDF to a PdfAnnotationEditor, counts the total annotations, removes all annotations with DeleteAnnotations, and then verifies the count after deletion.

extract-pdf-annotation-details.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details to Custom DTO
extract-pdf-annotation-details.description: Shows how to use PdfAnnotationEditor to read all annotations from a PDF, retrieve their name, type, and rectangle, and store the data in a custom C# object.

audit-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Audit PDF Annotations and Log to JSON
audit-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Extracts annotation properties from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor, serializes the data to indented JSON, and writes it to a log file for auditing purposes.

delete-annotation-with-error-handling.title: Delete Annotation with Error Handling
delete-annotation-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, attempting to delete a non‑existent annotation using PdfAnnotationEditor, and handling any resulting exceptions gracefully.

delete-annotations-by-author.title: Delete Annotations by Author Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to filter PDF annotations by the author (Title) and remove them using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

remove-annotations-by-color.title: Remove Annotations Matching a Specific RGB Color
remove-annotations-by-color.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and delete any annotation whose Color property matches a given RGB value, then save the updated document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and importing that XFDF into another PDF to replicate the annotation layout.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations in a Folder
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a directory, flatten their annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the flattened copies with a "_flattened" suffix.

batch-delete-stamp-annotations.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
batch-delete-stamp-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a directory and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Demonstrates how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments and apply those annotations to several PDF documents, saving the annotated versions.

parallel-delete-pdf-annotations.title: Parallel Deletion of Annotations from PDFs
parallel-delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to remove all annotations from a collection of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor with Parallel.ForEach.

measure-flatten-annotations-performance.title: Measure Time to Flatten PDF Annotations
measure-flatten-annotations-performance.description: Loads a 500‑page PDF, flattens all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the flattened file, and reports the elapsed time to assess performance impact.

list-annotation-names-in-pdf.title: List Annotation Names in PDF
list-annotation-names-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use PdfAnnotationEditor to extract all annotations, and print each annotation's name (or indicate missing) to the console for debugging.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete All Annotations from PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a text annotation, removing all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations, and verifying the removal via a unit test.

retry-annotation-deletion-pdf.title: Retry Annotation Deletion with PdfAnnotationEditor
retry-annotation-deletion-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete all annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor with a retry mechanism that rebinds the document if the first attempt fails.

delete-pdf-annotations-with-logging.title: Delete PDF Annotations and Log Details
delete-pdf-annotations-with-logging.description: Shows how to traverse each page of a PDF, delete every annotation, and write the annotation's name, type, and page number to a CSV log file using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-specific-annotation-types-from-pd.title: Delete Specific Annotation Types from PDF Using Configuration
delete-specific-annotation-types-from-pd.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that lists annotation types and delete only those annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations-with-progre.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations with Progress
batch-delete-pdf-annotations-with-progre.description: Demonstrates how to delete all annotations from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and shows a simple progress percentage for each processed file.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation Support
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf while supporting cancellation via a CancellationToken.

get-pdf-annotation-names-by-author.title: Retrieve PDF Annotation Names by Author
get-pdf-annotation-names-by-author.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and return the titles of markup annotations whose author (Subject) matches a given string.

copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Copy Annotations from Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF byte array and import them into several target PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then confirm that no annotation objects remain by inspecting each page's annotation collection.

pdf-annotation-removal-report.title: PDF Annotation Removal and Summary Report
pdf-annotation-removal-report.description: Demonstrates how to delete all annotations from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and generate a summary of removed annotations per file.

pdf-annotation-helper-bind-delete-flatte.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Binding, Deleting, Flattening, and Saving
pdf-annotation-helper-bind-delete-flatte.description: Shows a reusable helper class that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades to bind to a PDF, delete annotations (all or by type), flatten remaining annotations, and save the updated document.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v3.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v3.description: Shows how to bind a PDF stream to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned PDF back to a stream or file.

async-process-pdf-annotations.title: Asynchronously Process PDF Annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor
async-process-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to perform annotation operations on a PDF (bind, delete, import, flatten, save) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor wrapped in Task.Run for non‑blocking asynchronous execution.

delete-pdf-annotations.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs
delete-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to remove every annotation from PDF files in a specified folder using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor and save the cleaned PDFs.

log-annotation-modification-timestamp.title: Log Annotation Modification Timestamp in PDF
log-annotation-modification-timestamp.description: Demonstrates setting the Modified property on a TextAnnotation template and applying it to all existing annotations, while logging the timestamp of the change.

delete-selected-annotations.title: Delete Selected Annotation Types from PDF
delete-selected-annotations.description: Creates a sample PDF with various annotations, then deletes specified annotation types using PdfAnnotationEditor.

backup-pdf-delete-all-annotations.title: Backup PDF and Delete All Annotations
backup-pdf-delete-all-annotations.description: Demonstrates creating a backup copy of a PDF file and then removing all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, saving the cleaned document.

delete-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Name
delete-annotation-by-name.description: Shows how to delete a PDF annotation by its name using a string literal and a variable.

benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation for PDF Annotations
benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.description: Demonstrates how to measure the performance of removing all annotations with DeleteAnnotations versus removing a single annotation by name with DeleteAnnotation using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and log the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

extract-annotation-rectangles.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles and Visualize as PDF Pages
extract-annotation-rectangles.description: Demonstrates how to read all annotations in a PDF, extract their rectangle bounds, and create a new PDF where each page visualizes one annotation rectangle with optional descriptive text.

add-custom-annotation-flags.title: Add Custom Annotation Flags to PDF Annotations
add-custom-annotation-flags.description: Shows how to set custom annotation flags such as Print and Locked on a TextAnnotation and apply the changes to all pages using PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-annotations-network-share.title: Flatten Annotations in PDFs on a Network Share
flatten-annotations-network-share.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files on a UNC/network share and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, overwriting each original document.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify__v2.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify__v2.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade and then validates that no annotation objects remain by scanning each page's annotation collection.

export-pdf-annotations-pretty-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-pretty-xfdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, exporting its annotations to XFDF, and saving the XML with indentation for easier manual editing.

pdf-annotation-helper.title: PdfAnnotationHelper Wrapper for Simplified Annotation Operations
pdf-annotation-helper.description: Demonstrates a custom wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor providing simple methods to delete, flatten, and save PDF annotations.

pdf-annotation-utility.title: PDF Annotation Operations Command‑Line Utility
pdf-annotation-utility.description: Shows a console application that can delete pages, flatten all annotations, or export annotations to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-annotations-to-xfdf-empty-pdf.title: Export Annotations to XFDF for a PDF with No Annotations
export-annotations-to-xfdf-empty-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to export annotations from a PDF that contains no annotations, producing a minimal valid XFDF document.

merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine several XFDF annotation files into a single XFDF stream using PdfAnnotationEditor and then import the merged data into a target PDF with the Form facade.

diagnostic-annotation-workflow.title: Diagnostic Annotation Workflow with Logging
diagnostic-annotation-workflow.description: Demonstrates creating a PdfAnnotationEditor, adding text and link annotations, flattening them, and saving the PDF while logging each step to a verbose log file.

get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.title: Get Annotation Count per PDF Page
get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages, and retrieving the number of annotations on each page for reporting.

clone-modify-pdf-annotation.title: Clone and Modify PDF Annotation
clone-modify-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to clone an existing annotation, adjust its properties (color, contents, title, etc.), and add the cloned annotation back to the same page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-match.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into Matching PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-match.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, locate matching XFDF files by name, and import their annotations into the PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

concurrent-import-delete-pdf.title: Concurrent Import and Delete Operations on a PDF
concurrent-import-delete-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to safely perform simultaneous page import and delete operations on the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with thread synchronization.

backup-pdf-flatten-form-fields.title: Backup PDF and Flatten Form Fields
backup-pdf-flatten-form-fields.description: Shows how to create a backup copy of a PDF before flattening all form fields using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

count-pdf-annotation-types.title: Count PDF Annotation Types
count-pdf-annotation-types.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfAnnotationEditor to extract all annotations from a PDF and return a dictionary with the occurrence count for each annotation type.

batch-flatten-annotations-skip-readonly.title: Batch Flatten Annotations Skipping Read‑Only
batch-flatten-annotations-skip-readonly.description: Demonstrates iterating through all pages of a PDF, flattening each annotation except those marked as read‑only, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

annotation-operations-logging.title: Log Annotation Operations with Aspose PDF
annotation-operations-logging.description: Demonstrates how to wrap Aspose.Pdf annotation actions (add, modify, delete, import, save) with a simple logging interceptor that measures execution time using Stopwatch.

delete-annotations-export-xfdf.title: Delete Specific Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
delete-annotations-export-xfdf.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a given type from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

modify-pdf-annotations-retry-backoff.title: Modify PDF Annotations with Retry and Exponential Backoff
modify-pdf-annotations-retry-backoff.description: Demonstrates how to modify all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while handling transient I/O errors with a retry policy that employs exponential backoff.

list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotations with Page Numbers to CSV
list-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to iterate through a PDF's annotation collection, retrieve each annotation's name and its page number, and write the results to a CSV file.

remove-old-pdf-annotations.title: Remove Old Annotations from PDF
remove-old-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, find annotations older than a specified number of days, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

check-duplicate-annotation-names.title: Check for Duplicate Annotation Names in a PDF
check-duplicate-annotation-names.description: Shows how to iterate through all annotations in a PDF, identify annotation names that appear more than once, and log the pages where the duplicates occur.

extract-pdf-annotations-summary.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Create a Summary Document
extract-pdf-annotations-summary.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to extract all annotation contents from a PDF and compile them into a new summary PDF file.

flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.title: Flatten PDF Annotations While Preserving Appearance
flatten-pdf-annotations__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfAnnotationEditor facade to flatten all annotations in a PDF, keeping their visual appearance but removing interactive features, and then save the result.

merge-annotation-layers.title: Merge Annotation Layers from Multiple PDFs
merge-annotation-layers.description: Demonstrates how to combine annotation layers from several PDF documents into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

pdfannotationeditor-binding-health-check.title: PdfAnnotationEditor Binding Health Check
pdfannotationeditor-binding-health-check.description: Creates a minimal PDF and uses PdfAnnotationEditor to bind to it, confirming that the facade can open a PDF without errors.

export-delete-archive-annotations.title: Export Annotations to XFDF, Delete Them, and Archive XFDF
export-delete-archive-annotations.description: Creates a PDF with a sample annotation, exports all annotations to an XFDF file, removes the annotations from the PDF, and archives the XFDF file.

flatten-pdfs-to-custom-output-directory.title: Flatten PDFs and Save to Custom Output Directory
flatten-pdfs-to-custom-output-directory.description: The example demonstrates loading PDF files from an input folder, flattening their form fields and annotations, and saving the flattened PDFs to a user‑specified output directory.

log-file-sizes-before-after-annotation-f.title: Log File Sizes Before and After Annotation Flattening
log-file-sizes-before-after-annotation-f.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, and logs the original and new file sizes for audit tracking.

modify-annotation-subject.title: Modify Annotation Subject in PDF
modify-annotation-subject.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a text annotation, using PdfAnnotationEditor to update the annotation's Subject property, and verifying the change with a unit test.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations-retain-type.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
batch-delete-pdf-annotations-retain-type.description: Demonstrates how to delete all annotations from a PDF except those listed in a JSON configuration file, using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from a Stream
flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF supplied as a stream and return the modified document as a MemoryStream, avoiding any disk I/O.

flatten-pdf-add-flattened-date-metadata.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Flattened Date Metadata
flatten-pdf-add-flattened-date-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, flattens all form fields into static content, adds a custom metadata entry with the current UTC date, and saves the updated document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-log.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Log Content
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-log.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to an XFDF file using PdfAnnotationEditor and writing the XFDF content to a log file for diagnostic purposes.

clone-text-annotation-change-color.title: Clone Text Annotation and Change Its Color
clone-text-annotation-change-color.description: Demonstrates how to clone a text annotation from one page, modify its color, and add it to another page in the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-process-pdfs-azure-blob-pdfannotat.title: Batch Process PDFs from Azure Blob Storage with PdfAnnotationEditor
batch-process-pdfs-azure-blob-pdfannotat.description: The example enumerates PDF blobs in an Azure Blob container, streams each PDF into Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to modify annotations, and uploads the edited PDF to another container.

annotation-summary-report.title: Generate PDF Annotation Summary Report
annotation-summary-report.description: The example loads one or more PDF files, extracts all annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, counts them by type, and writes a concise text report.

conditional-pdf-flattening-based-on-digi.title: Conditional PDF Flattening Based on Digital Signatures
conditional-pdf-flattening-based-on-digi.description: The example checks a PDF for existing digital signatures using the PdfFileSignature facade and only flattens form fields and annotations when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

rename-pdf-annotation-names.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
rename-pdf-annotation-names.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through all pages and annotations, rename each annotation's Name using a standardized prefix, and save the modified document.

manage-pdf-annotations-verbose.title: Manage PDF Annotations with Verbose Logging
manage-pdf-annotations-verbose.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, export, delete, flatten, and import annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with an optional --verbose flag for detailed operation logging.

test-export-annotations-unbound-pdfannot.title: Test ExportAnnotations throws on unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
test-export-annotations-unbound-pdfannot.description: Demonstrates how to verify that calling ExportAnnotationsToXfdf on a PdfAnnotationEditor that is not bound to any PDF document results in an exception.

extract-group-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Extract and Group PDF Annotations by Author
extract-group-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to extract annotations from a PDF, read the author (Title) from markup annotations, and group the annotations by author for reporting.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-custom-na.description: Shows how to export PDF annotations to an XFDF file and replace the default XML namespace with a custom one to satisfy enterprise XML standards.

folder-watcher-flatten-annotations.title: Folder Watcher to Flatten PDF Annotations
folder-watcher-flatten-annotations.description: Monitors a directory for newly added PDF files and flattens all their annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotation-.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Annotation Modifications
validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotation-.description: Demonstrates how to validate a PDF for corrupted objects after performing annotation changes using Aspose.Pdf's Document and PdfAnnotationEditor.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-gzip.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and GZip Compress
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-gzip.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to XFDF format using Aspose.Pdf and then compress the resulting XFDF data with GZip for efficient storage.

import-xfdf-into-pdf-and-cleanup.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF and Clean Up Temporary File
import-xfdf-into-pdf-and-cleanup.description: Demonstrates how to import field values from an XFDF file into a PDF using the Form facade and then delete the temporary XFDF file after a successful import.
